## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what doesn't work.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce:

1. Run `...` on this file
2. See error: `...`

## Expected vs Actual

What should happen vs what happens.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Linux x86_64, macOS ARM64, Windows]
- ithmb-core version: [e.g. 1.9.1]
- Rust version: `rustc --version`
- Feature flags: [e.g. simd, none]

## File (if applicable)

- Attach the .ithmb file that triggers the bug
- Or describe how to generate a synthetic test case
- File size in bytes

## Additional Context

- Does it work with the C# reference?
- Does it work with `--features simd` vs without?
